channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Can the post office help millions who lack glasses get eye exams?
item.description: In some Indian towns, post office visitors struggling to read fine print may be offered an eye test.

item.title: Massive 1940s steam locomotive makes rare cross-country journey
item.description: Crowds of rail enthusiasts gather to see the historic Big Boy locomotive on its rare trip across the United States.

item.title: Justice Department subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One report
item.description: The Times reports federal agents visited several of its journalists to compel grand jury testimony next week regarding their coverage of...

item.title: Opinion: Is democracy a joke? Count Binface says no.
item.description: Populist British MP Nigel Farage resigned from Parliament amid questions about his finances and is now seeking re-election in his constituency. His b...
